productDisplayName: Reebok Women Zig Sonic Yellow and Grey Sports Shoes
description: Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays and synthetic lining with cutouts for style, support and breath ability Grey lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Perforated panel on the tongue for greater breath ability StableFit technology in the heel provides excellent rear-foot fit and stability Play Dry lining on the insole for moisture management Full-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning ZigTech's unique zigzag sole designed to optimize energy return, helps to propel you forward with each step and reduces wear and tear on your shins by 20% Performance design for lateral support and stability Forefoot flex grooves for flexibility and better running performance Multi-surface outsole for optimal traction TPU medial post for midfoot pronation control Carbon-rubber heel strike offers durability and traction on any surfaceWarranty: 3 months from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects only
